metadata.name: Washington Business Search
metadata.description: Search Washington Secretary of State CCFS business entity database by name, paginate AngularJS SPA results (25 per page), extract business name, UBI number, type, principal office, registered agent, and status

variables.name: correlationId
variables.description: Trace correlation ID from calling client

variables.name: searchEntryUrl
variables.description: Washington CCFS Corporation Search SPA URL

variables.name: maxPages
variables.description: Maximum number of result pages to scrape (25 results per page)

variables.name: results
variables.description: Accumulated search results across all pages

variables.name: isLastPage
variables.description: Set to truthy when current page is the last page

actions.description: Load Washington CCFS Corporation Search SPA

actions.errorMessage: Cloudflare Turnstile challenge detected. Request blocked by anti-bot protection.

actions.description: Wait for AngularJS SPA to render Corporation Search Business Name input
Wait for Cloudflare Turnstile to complete or disappear before interacting (Turnstile widget in login section must finish or it blocks API calls)
actions.javascript: () => { var cf = document.querySelector('iframe[src*="challenges.cloudflare.com"]'); if (!cf) return true; try { var box = cf.getBoundingClientRect(); if (box.width === 0 && box.height === 0) return true; } catch(e) { return true; } var text = document.body.innerText; if (text.includes('Verifying')) return false; return true; }

actions.description: Fill Business Name via AngularJS ngModel.$setViewValue for reliable model binding
actions.javascript: () => { const searchTerm = '${searchTerm}'; const inputs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type="text"], input:not([type])')); const input = inputs.find(i => i.placeholder && i.placeholder.toLowerCase().includes('business')); if (!input) throw new Error('Business Name input not found'); input.focus(); try { const ngModelCtrl = angular.element(input).controller('ngModel'); if (ngModelCtrl) { ngModelCtrl.$setViewValue(searchTerm); ngModelCtrl.$render(); angular.element(input).scope().$apply(); return 'ok'; } } catch(e) {} input.value = searchTerm; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); try { angular.element(input).scope().$apply(); } catch(e2) {} return 'ok'; }

actions.description: Wait for Corporation Search button to become enabled after AngularJS processes input
actions.javascript: () => { const btns = document.querySelectorAll('button:not([disabled])'); return Array.from(btns).some(b => b.querySelector('strong') && b.textContent.includes('Search')); }

actions.description: Click Corporation Search button (enabled after filling Business Name)

Wait for actual result rows to appear. Cloudflare Turnstile may appear on the results page (blocking the API call) — once it auto-resolves in headed Chrome, AngularJS retries the API and rows populate. Wait up to 60s for this full cycle.
actions.javascript: () => { var rows = document.querySelectorAll('table.table-striped tbody tr[ng-repeat] td'); if (rows.length > 0) return true; return false; }

actions.description: Extract business entity results from CCFS search results table. Each row includes business name, UBI number, business type, principal office, registered agent, and status. Generate uniqueKey from businessID and businessType via AngularJS scope.
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table.table-striped tbody tr[ng-repeat]')); if (!rows.length) return JSON.stringify([]); const results = []; for (const row of rows) { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); if (cells.length < 6) continue; const nameCell = cells[0]; const nameLink = nameCell.querySelector('a'); const name = normalize(nameLink ? nameLink.textContent : nameCell.textContent); if (!name) continue; let businessId = null; let businessType = null; try { const scope = angular.element(row).scope(); if (scope && scope.business) { businessId = String(scope.business.BusinessID); businessType = scope.business.BusinessType || ''; } } catch (e) {} const identifier = normalize(cells[1]?.textContent) || null; const entityType = normalize(cells[2]?.textContent) || null; const principalOfficeAddress = normalize(cells[3]?.textContent) || null; const registeredAgentName = normalize(cells[4]?.textContent) || null; const status = normalize(cells[5]?.textContent) || null; let uniqueKey = ''; if (businessId) { const keyObj = { state: 'US-WA', params: { businessId: businessId, businessType: businessType || '' } }; const keyJson = JSON.stringify(keyObj); uniqueKey = btoa(keyJson).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/, ''); } results.push({ name: name, identifier: identifier, entityType: entityType, status: status, principalOfficeAddress: principalOfficeAddress, registeredAgentName: registeredAgentName, uniqueKey: uniqueKey, state: 'WA', formationDate: null }); } return JSON.stringify(results); }

actions.description: Check if current page is the last page by inspecting pagination controls
actions.javascript: () => { const m = document.body.innerText.match(/Page\s+(\d+)\s+of\s+(\d+)/); if (!m) return 'true'; return (m[1] === m[2]) ? 'true' : ''; }

actions.description: Paginate through remaining result pages by clicking next page button
Click next page button in pagination controls

target.description: Next page button in pagination controls

actions.description: Wait for new page data to render in AngularJS
Check if current page is the last page
actions.javascript: () => { const m = document.body.innerText.match(/Page\s+(\d+)\s+of\s+(\d+)/); if (!m) return 'true'; return (m[1] === m[2]) ? 'true' : ''; }

actions.description: Extract business results from current page
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table.table-striped tbody tr[ng-repeat]')); if (!rows.length) return JSON.stringify([]); const results = []; for (const row of rows) { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); if (cells.length < 6) continue; const nameCell = cells[0]; const nameLink = nameCell.querySelector('a'); const name = normalize(nameLink ? nameLink.textContent : nameCell.textContent); if (!name) continue; let businessId = null; let businessType = null; try { const scope = angular.element(row).scope(); if (scope && scope.business) { businessId = String(scope.business.BusinessID); businessType = scope.business.BusinessType || ''; } } catch (e) {} const identifier = normalize(cells[1]?.textContent) || null; const entityType = normalize(cells[2]?.textContent) || null; const principalOfficeAddress = normalize(cells[3]?.textContent) || null; const registeredAgentName = normalize(cells[4]?.textContent) || null; const status = normalize(cells[5]?.textContent) || null; let uniqueKey = ''; if (businessId) { const keyObj = { state: 'US-WA', params: { businessId: businessId, businessType: businessType || '' } }; const keyJson = JSON.stringify(keyObj); uniqueKey = btoa(keyJson).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/, ''); } results.push({ name: name, identifier: identifier, entityType: entityType, status: status, principalOfficeAddress: principalOfficeAddress, registeredAgentName: registeredAgentName, uniqueKey: uniqueKey, state: 'WA', formationDate: null }); } return JSON.stringify(results); }
